title: 8 Ways a Man of God Goes First
caption:
He never waits to be asked.

The first apology — whoever was partly wrong doesn't matter, he closes the gap. The early morning alone, before anyone knows. The hard conversation no one wanted to start. The bill no one asked him to cover.

He gives the honest answer when a comfortable one was available. Does the work no one assigned. Confesses to a brother before he's caught. And when there's a cost, he pays it before anyone else has to.

Real leadership went to a cross first. He's been following that template ever since.

—

Save this for the man who leads by going first.

#faith #christianmen #leadership #godlymen #manofgod #servantleadership #thevision #scripture #discipline
theme: He leads by going first into the cost.
